title: NewsPulse AI articles.json
description: The data contract between the curator agent (write) and the static reader (read).

id.description: Stable unique id; used in the static article page URL.

summary.description: Short summary generated by the agent at publish time.

topic.description: 'Latest' or the topic prompt used to find the article.

publishedDate.description: Original publication date of the article (YYYY-MM-DD).

addedDate.description: When the curator published it via the agent (YYYY-MM-DD).

audience.description: Which i2e roles genuinely benefit: developers (Developers/Coders), qa (QA), ba-pc (BAs & Project Coordinators), pm (Project Managers), non-technical (Non-technical users). Optional.

whyRelevant.description: Answers 'Why is this relevant to me?' for an i2e reader.

dailyImpact.description: Answers 'How will this help in my daily job?'

practicalBenefit.description: Answers 'What practical benefit does it provide?'

relevance.description: Reader-facing relevance framing for i2e employees; optional, present on the newest items.
